REMARK: HEARING HELD ON 02/18/2026 DEFENDANT'S EX PARTE APPLICATION TO STAY THE INSTANT ACTION UNTIL DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION. THE COURT GRANTS THE APPLICATION (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR COMPLETE DETAILS). THE COURT DID NOT RECEIVE A COURTESY COPY OF THE OPPOSITION. THE COUNSEL WHO APPEARED ON THE EX PARTE HEARING ARE NOT COUNSEL OF RECORD. THE COURT ORDERED PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO SUBMIT, NO LATER THAN TEN (10) DAYS PRIOR TO THE MARCH 17, 2026 HEARING ON THE MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION, A DECLARATION CONFIRMING THAT ALL COUNSELS IN THEIR LAW FIRM HAS REVIEWED THE SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULES ESPECIALLY THE SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.7(B), AND AFFIRMING A COMMITMENT TO FULL COMPLIANCE THEREWITH, NOTWITHSTANDING PRIOR INSTANCES OF NONCOMPLIANCE. THE COURT FURTHER DIRECTED THAT ANY ATTORNEY APPEARING AT THE HEARING MUST BE COUNSEL OF RECORD OR THE ATTORNEY WHO PREPARED THE APPLICATION. NO SPECIAL APPEARANCES WILL BE PERMITTED.(302)

Off Calendar Mar-27-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

4 - PLAINTIFF ROBERT CURTIS, and JOSHUA KATZ-CURTIS' Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs' Request For Admissions, Set One.

On 3/17/2026, the court stayed this action. This motion, thus, is ordered off calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
